candidates.why: Direct operating revenue line with populated values; more specific top-line than subtotal/header rows.
Top-line revenue total; appears equal to core revenue and can serve as fallback across years.

variables.notes: Used a priority list of revenue labels rather than summing. Preferred the most specific reported revenue line over subtotal/header rows.

candidates.why: Best direct COGS/cost of sales line; represents direct operating/service costs.

variables.notes: Preferred the primary direct cost line over duplicated totals and over decomposition rows such as depreciation/amortization in cost of revenues.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row populated across years and excludes D&A detail lines; preferred over broader operating expense totals.
Dedicated above-EBIT R&D line. Included in XSGA as well so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD removes it, since the selected SG&A row explicitly excludes the separate R&D line.

variables.notes: Did not use SG&A total because component row exists and D&A/amortization are separately listed and excluded. Included separate R&D line in XSGA because the selected SG&A component appears to exclude it; this aligns with the XSGA-XRD construction.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT with populated values across years.

variables.notes: Chosen as the dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit/EBIT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most direct recurring interest expense line; preferable to broader net financing totals because it excludes FX/other non-interest items.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring lease interest component that can be added where reported to improve coverage of financing costs.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest components instead of net financing total. The lease-interest line is a recurring financing cost and is added separately where available.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner/parent-only equity line, which excludes minority interest and avoids double counting with MIB.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent owner-attributable equity line and good fallback if labels vary by year.
Also appears to match parent common equity and excludes minority interest; suitable fallback.
Common equity label matching parent/common shareholders' equity; suitable fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list uses parent/common equity lines that exclude minority interest, consistent with BE + MIB construction.

candidates.why: Equivalent minority interest label and valid fallback across years.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet minority interest labels rather than income-statement minority interest flows.
